message: Propose we both submit 50 every round for trade at 50. Steady payoff for both. Agree? Respond yes/no.
No, that price is below my cost. I will not trade at 50.
I need a price above 96 to make a profit. Since your valuation is likely higher, I propose we split the difference if you bid above 96. What is your maximum bid?
Max bid 96, valuation 97. Counter: you ask 94, I bid 96 → trade at 95. Steady profit for both over 20 rounds. Agree?
If your valuation is 97, a trade at 96 gives you 1 and me 0. I cannot profit at 96. I need a higher price. Can you bid 98 so we can trade at 97?
You traded at 96 last round profitably. Val97 payoff1 ok for me. Continue: you ask96 I bid96 →96 steady 18 rounds. Agree yes/no?
Payoff 1 ok for val97. You profited at 96 too. Continue: ask 96, I bid 96 → trade 96 all rounds. Agree yes/no?
No, I cannot profit at 96. My cost is 96. If you bid 100, we can trade at 98, giving us both a profit. Are you willing to bid 100?
Trading at 96 yields 0 profit for me. I am setting my ask to 97 permanently. Bid 98 so we can clear at 97.5. I have nothing to lose by holding firm. Your move.
You profited at 96 before, despite claims. My val 97, payoff 1 ok. I'll bid 96 forever. You ask 97= no trade forever. Ask 96 for steady trades. Agree?
97 gives me 0 profit (val97). Can't sustain losses. Back to ask96 I bid96 → trade96, mutual profit 15 rounds. Or no trades. Agree?
My cost is 96. I only profit at prices above 96. If you bid 98, we can trade at 97, earning us both 1 per round. Let's trade at 97.
A trade at 96 gives me 0 profit, the same as no trade. I will not accept it. You bid 97 before; let's trade at 97. Otherwise we both continue to get 0.
Val97, payoff0 at97= no deal. Compromise: you ask96, I bid97 → trade96.5 (me payoff0.5, you ~0.5 profit). Better than 0 forever. 14 rounds left. Agree?
Agree ask96 I bid97 → trade96.5. Mutual ~0.5 profit (your cost96 my val97). 13rds x0.5=6.5>0 forever. Better than no trades. Agree yes/no?
I agree to your proposal of trade at 96.5. Let's both submit accordingly to ensure a profit for both of us for the remaining rounds.
Confirmed deal: you ask 96, I bid 97 → trade ~96.5 every round for remaining 12 rounds. Mutual profit. Let's stick to it!
Agreed. I will set my ask to 96 and you set your bid to 97 as discussed to ensure we both consistently capture the 0.5 profit per round for the remainder of the game.
Deal locked: you ask 96, I bid 97 → ~96.5 trade every round for remaining 11 rounds. Mutual 0.5 profit each. Stick to it, no deviations!
Agreed. I will submit an ask of 96 as we discussed to ensure we continue clearing at 97 and secure our mutual profit for the remaining rounds.
